name: Minerva Intelligence Inc.
summary: Minerva Intelligence Inc. engages in developing and marketing artificial intelligent (AI) software products. Its AI platform system combines human expertise with various information from public and private databases to streamline primarily mineral discovery. The company's principal products include Target that identifies mineral exploration targets in exploration data sets, which are vast and complex for humans to evaluate; and GAIA, which identifies and evaluates landslide and floods hazards. Its principal products also comprise ACE builds taxonomies in applications; and LEO, a system for management of digital knowledge, including preloaded geoscience taxonomies, customizable automatic tagging system, and front-end search function that allows users to interrogate their document repository. In addition, the company engages in developing INSPIRE mapping data for use in the environmental protection and land-use planning. Minerva Intelligence Inc. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
